executives.name: Catharine Farrow
executives.background: Dr. Catharine Farrow is a professional geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the CEO of TMAC Resources Inc.

executives.name: Mark Morcombe
executives.background: Mark Morcombe has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously held senior roles at AngloGold Ashanti and Acacia Mining.
